reasoning_chain: The narrow, unmarked asphalt road with grass verges is typical of rural Danish country roads.
The presence of a wire fence along the cornfield and the style of utility poles match Danish agricultural infrastructure.
The golden wheat field and green corn indicate a temperate climate consistent with Denmark’s growing season.
No visible signage or vehicles, but the landscape homogeneity and flat terrain are characteristic of Jutland or Zealand.
